name: libldap-common
title: libldap-common
description:
OpenLDAP common files for libraries
These are common files for the run-time libraries for the OpenLDAP
(Lightweight Directory Access Protocol) servers and clients.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libldap-common because OpenLDAP common files for libraries.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libldap-common as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libldap-common with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libldap-common --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
